node.text: John and his friends were teammates for four years in high school and have played together for quite some time.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "teammates football gift") on Session 9 (Score: 0.68)

node.text: John had a career-high in assists last Friday during a big game against their rival.
John's team won a trophy after all their hard work and effort.
John is supportive of Tim and offers help whenever needed.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "teammates football gift") on Session 9 (Score: 0.68)

node.text: John's team faced tough opponents, but they do not quit and back each other up to get better.
John mentioned needing new shoes after all the games and showed interest in Tim's comfortable shoe recommendation.
John had an intense season with tough losses and great wins in the games.
John had a major challenge when he hurt his ankle last season and had to undergo physical therapy.
John offers to help Tim out when he plans to visit NYC.

context_trace.description: Matched atom(content =~ "teammates football gift") on Session 9 (Score: 0.68)

node.text: John feels that the team bond is awesome and makes all the hard work worth it.
